evidence_text:
8 MONITORING AND REVIEW

This Policy is developed and owned by the <CLIENT> Information Security (IS) Team. It is reviewed by the CISO and approved by the CEO.

<CLIENT> IS Team will initiate a review and of this Policy annually or whenever a significant change occurs in the organization’s operating environment.

Feedback, suggestions or questions regarding the Policy shall be directed to the <CLIENT> IS Team at [infosec@<CLIENT>.net](mailto:infosec@cpx.net) .

evidence_text:
4 POLICY STATEMENT

<CLIENT> shall develop, implement, and maintain Information Systems Acquisition, Development and Maintenance Procedure to:

1. Provide strategies, tools, and techniques to protect risks towards supply chain.
2. Prevent unauthorized modification or misuse of the information in applications.
3. Maintain security in development and support processes.
4. Manage technical vulnerabilities.
